name: v0.8-regeneration-plan
purpose: Define the ordered regeneration plan after the v0.8 target surface reset.

orderedLayers.goal: Keep prototype-derived tokens and visual rules as the stable base.
exitCriteria: canonical token file remains src/design-system/foundations/tokens.css
src/design-system/tokens.css is not recreated
visual rules apply to all-active-ds-surface
runtime visual rules do not recommend obsolete semantic wrappers

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate the low-level visual primitives used by the rest of the DS.
exitCriteria: no local visual grammar
no hardcoded prototype values outside tokens
component docs are regenerated or explicitly transitional
Storybook coverage is release-relevant after regeneration

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate semantic display as four public primitives.
exitCriteria: no obsolete semantic wrapper remains public
golden examples use only target semantic primitives
runtime and prompt guidance route only to target semantic primitives

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate the reusable screen structure layer.
exitCriteria: screen layout uses reusable composition only
panel behavior is package-owned
shared transitional panel docs are split or regenerated when release-ready

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate decision layer around cognitive structures rather than business cards.
exitCriteria: card differences come from props and slots, not duplicate components
decision folder contains reusable decision structures only
props contract anchors are moved from transitional cards to target blocks

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate only reusable Make-facing screen patterns.
exitCriteria: Installed Base remains strict and contractual
Customer Monitoring proves generalization
application-specific wrappers are moved to examples or deleted

orderedLayers.goal: Regenerate active examples, stories, prompts and benchmarks against the target surface.
exitCriteria: all active examples share the same v0.8 visual grammar
prompts generate without local components
benchmarks penalize component proliferation and visual drift

releaseExitCriteria: npm pack --dry-run shows a clean package surface
legacy wrappers are deleted or moved out of active Make-facing surface
README and CHANGELOG describe the v0.8 target surface
